content: A 2024-2025 SOTA agent memory system can be rearchitected to gate long-term retention of unlabeled data points based on the autonomous curiosity signal generated by the agent’s intrinsic curiosity module (ICM), only prioritizing surprising, under-explored data for active learning selection rather than retaining all collected experience. This curiosity-gated memory creates a self-reinforcing autonomous learning loop where the agent’s intrinsic motivation drives both what it remembers long-term and what it chooses to learn next.
